features: Oil-Control: This vanishing face cream moisturiser is specially formulated to control excess oil production, leaving a matte, shine-free finish.
Lightweight Formula: With a non-greasy, lightweight texture, it absorbs quickly into the skin without leaving a heavy or sticky residue.
Hydration: Despite its oil-control properties, it provides long-lasting hydration to keep your very oily skin balanced and comfortable.
Mattifying Effect: The cream helps to minimise the appearance of pores and imparts a smooth, velvety matte finish to the complexion.
Suitable for Oily Skin: Designed specifically for very oily skin types, this 100ml moisturiser helps regulate sebum production and keeps shine at bay.
description: Product description Lasting Oil Control Vanishing Face Cream Moisturiser is a godsend for those with very oily skin. This lightweight, non-greasy formula glides onto the skin, providing long-lasting hydration without clogging pores or leaving a shiny residue. Formulated with oil-absorbing powders and mattifying agents, it helps control excess sebum production and minimise shine throughout the day. The vanishing cream texture melts seamlessly into the skin, leaving a velvety, matte finish that lasts for hours. With a capacity of 100ml, this moisturiser is perfect for daily use, ensuring your complexion stays fresh, matte, and well-balanced. Suitable for all skin types, especially those prone to oiliness, this cream is a must-have for achieving a flawless, shine-free appearance. Embrace a matte, radiant glow without the greasy aftermath. Ingredients (Water), Stearic Acid, Fumed Silica, Propylene Glycol, Safety Warning External use only See more
